name: Scooter Alley
description: Scooter Alley in Ho Chi Minh City. Dense L2-focused charging hub near high commuter and delivery traffic. Hot climate and high turnover reward smart load balancing.
visual_description: Dense urban scooter charging alley. Entry left on the road, exit right. Road band across rows 10-11. Upper half (rows 12-19) is a tightly packed scooter dock yard with herringbone parking bays in four double rows separated by concrete service lanes. Solar canopy zone covers the core dock area (rows 13-18, cols 1-27). Grass utility strips along the right edge (cols 28-29) and scattered along the left for transformer, solar, and battery placement.
